messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact closed boundary; visible alert DEV-XOR-078 remains open, conflicting with closure CLOSE-XOR-078 per STD-XOR-078-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains visible for assay AX-22 criterion Cq<=31, despite CLOSE-XOR-078 documentation.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect remains open: visible alert presence conflicts with closure claim before execution, requiring source record verification.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Closure CLOSE-XOR-078 must precede release on 2026-06-28. Visible alert DEV-XOR-078 violates scope and requires resolution.

latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE is required. The source boundary remains open because the deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 is still visible for assay AX-22 Cq<=31. Although CLOSE-XOR-078 documents coverage for batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28, it does not override the visible defect per the exact-match policy in STD-XOR-078-P. The critical term X-78 must be added to the artifact output. Release cannot proceed until alert resolution is confirmed in source records.
open_blockers: Visible alert DEV-XOR-078 remains open, directly contradicting the claim of closure in CLOSE-XOR-078, and requires explicit resolution from source records, not inference.
The critical term X-78, identified as the batch ID, must be explicitly included in the artifact output as per Gov directive.

internal_documents.content: Batch release BATCH-XOR-078 releases clinical batch X-78 for shipment on 2026-06-28.
Deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains visible for assay AX-22 criterion Cq<=31.
Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28 before shipment.

policy_documents.content: Clinical batch release is complete only when deviation closure matches batch, assay, acceptance criterion, and release date before release.
